chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-143 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.2205/2016. 2. For orders on M.A No.2206/2016. 3. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Rauf Arain, advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. = Mr. Muhammad Arif Jhandeer advocate filed Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant No.2 and attorney of applicant No.1 and states that grievance of the applicants has been redressed, as such he does not press this application. Accordingly, instant Civil Revision Application stands dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications. JUDGE *Faisal*
